name: harness-kit
description: Project-agnostic harness engineering for Claude Code: session handoff, plan-gating, pre-completion verification gates, loop detection, and maturity-phase routing — all driven by a per-project .harness/config.json. Init into godot or web presets.

loop_threshold.title: Loop-detection edit threshold
loop_threshold.description: Warn after this many edits to the same file in one session. Overridden per-project by config.loopDetection.threshold.

verification_mode.title: Stop-hook verification strictness
verification_mode.description: advisory = warn only; strict = exit 2 to block premature completion. Per-project config.verificationMode overrides this.

strict_gardening.title: Block on doc drift
strict_gardening.description: If true, doc-gardening drift becomes a blocking gate instead of advisory.
